title: The item pop-up card

posts.author: Julien (Fernandez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all,

Since this week I have an issue when I click on an connected-board field with an entry.

Before today, the normal behaviour open me a pop-up ( The item pop-up card – Support (monday.com) ) and I can modify the entry directly into it.

image680×532 58.3 KB

Now, the item card opens (once I have an item card) or the updates card (if I have no item card created).

image829×47 7.24 KB

Do you have some ideas why this occurs?

Kr,

posts.author: karenw (Karen Wong)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello - I’ve run into this issue as well, did you figure out how to resolve it?

posts.author: Julien (Fernandez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @karenw,

@Monday explained to me that this is the “normal” behaviour now for the “CRM product”.

For me, it’s a step backwards because we don’t have the option to choose whether we want the “previous” pop-up card (faster for users) or the new one.

What I did was to create all the Item cards for each table.

I hope this helps.

Kr,
